content: I want to add my new baby to my healthcare plan

Congratulations on your new baby! I can help you with adding your child to your health plan.

First, I need to report the birth as a life event. I will need the date of birth. Then, I can add your baby as a dependent. I'll need a few more details for that:

- What is your baby's full name?
- What is their date of birth?
- What is their Social Security Number (SSN)?
Alice Smith, born January 20 2026, no SSN yet

Okay, I will report the birth of your baby as a life event with the date of birth as January 20, 2026, and then I will add Alice Smith (born January 20, 2026) as a dependent child to your profile. Please note that you'll need to provide Alice's SSN as soon as you have it.

Should I proceed?
